Hi, I'm Purushothaman, a System Administrator based in Chennai, currently at Velammal Nexus. With 1.5 years managing IT infrastructure, Windows Server, Active Directory, and LAN/WAN networks, I've built a strong operational foundation.

CCNA-certified with hands-on experience in routers, switches, VLANs, routing protocols, firewall configuration, and endpoint security — plus an internship in Network Security at Network Rhinos covering IDS/IPS, VPNs, vulnerability assessment, and incident response.

Transitioning to Cybersecurity & Network Security Engineering
Combining real-world infrastructure experience with dedicated security training to move into threat detection, network defense, and secure architecture roles.

// WHAT I'VE BUILT & SECURED

IT Infrastructure Tasks

AD & User Management
Managed Active Directory accounts, groups, and permissions. Implemented Group Policies for security compliance across all branches.
Security & Monitoring
Implemented antivirus/firewall policies, monitored systems, ensured IT security compliance, and performed regular system audits.
Server Maintenance & Backup
Configured and maintained Windows Server 2019, scheduled automated backups, and tested restoration procedures for DR readiness.
Network Setup & Troubleshooting
Installed and configured switches, routers, and access points. Resolved LAN/WAN issues across 9 branch offices with 99% uptime.
Endpoint Deployment & Support
Deployed and configured Windows 10/11 systems, installed software, and provided L1–L2 helpdesk support for 150+ users.
Multi-Branch IT Support
Provided remote and onsite IT support across multiple branches, troubleshooting network, hardware, and software issues.
Backup & Disaster Recovery
Created and tested backup schedules and recovery procedures, ensuring data integrity and business continuity.
User Training & Documentation
Trained end-users on systems and security best practices. Created comprehensive IT process documentation for internal audits.
Printer & Peripheral Management
Installed and maintained network printers, scanners, CCTV, biometric devices — resolved hardware issues with 98% uptime.
